titleEn: Farm-ING now offers a choice of 3 different smart weeders
titleZh: Farm-ING推出三款智能除草机，覆盖喷洒、激光与中耕
summaryZh: 奥地利智能农业设备公司Farm-ING扩展其智能除草产品线，新增SpotSprayING精准点喷除草机和LaserING激光除草机，加上原有的InRowING行内中耕机，共提供三种AI支持的智能除草方案。点喷机工作宽度可达12米，起价7.5万欧元；激光除草机预计2026年上市，起价30万欧元。该系列展示了AI视觉识别技术在杂草精准防控中的最新进展，对智慧种植业具有重要参考价值。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了AI视觉识别与精准施药、激光除草技术在种植业中的最新商业化应用，对智慧畜牧行业人士理解跨领域精准农业技术趋势具有启发意义，尤其是传感器与自动化决策在田间管理中的实践。
contentFull: Farm-ING now offers a choice of 3 different smart weeders 17-06 | Weed/Pest control | NewsLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintThe spotsprayer is available with 5 different working widths ranging from 2.75 to 12 metres and from prices starting at €75,000. Photos: Farm-INGAustrian smart farming equipment specialist Farm-ING has added 2 additional smart weeder options to its line-up. Farmers and contractors can now also spot-spray and laser-weed with Farm-ING. With a total of 3 different options for smart weeding, Farm-ING now offers the most extensive and varied portfolio of specialised AI-supported machines for selective weeding. The young Austrian manufacturer initially developed its InRowING in-row hoeing machine. Launched at the 2023 Agritechnica trade show in Hanover, Germany, the InRowING hoe is now available with working widths up to 7.5 metres. Prices start at €65,000. Ultra precise spot spraying up to 12 metresSince 2026, the company has also been delivering its SpotSprayING spotsprayer that uses the same algorithms as the in-row hoeing machine to distinguish plants from weeds. The spotsprayer is available with 5 different working widths ranging from 2.75 to 12 metres and from prices starting at €75,000. With the 12-metre-wide working width, the manufacturer is setting new standards when it comes to mounted 3-point linkage spotsprayers. In a solo configuration, both the spotsprayer and the tanks are combined in one unit behind the tractor. With a split configuration, the standard 400-litre tank moves to the front. The Farm-ING LaserING with working widths of 2 or 3 metres is expected to become available this year.Laser weeder coming up this yearLaser weeding is currently an extremely hot topic with farmers, growers and contractors across the world, and Farm-ING is joining the companies offering laser weeding solutions. A first prototype of the mounted laser weeder was shown at the 2025 Agritechnica trade show in Hanover, Germany. The Farm-ING LaserING with working widths of 2 or 3 metres is expected to become available in 2026 for prices starting at €300,000. translationZh:
奥地利智能农业设备专家Farm-ING在其产品线中增加了两款额外的智能除草机选项。农民和承包商现在也可以使用Farm-ING进行点喷和激光除草。凭借总共三种不同的智能除草选项，Farm-ING现在提供了最广泛且多样化的专业AI支持选择性除草机器组合。

这家年轻的奥地利制造商最初开发了InRowING行内中耕机。该机型于2023年在德国汉诺威的Agritechnica贸易展上推出，现在工作宽度可达7.5米，起价6.5万欧元。

**超精准点喷，工作宽度达12米**

自2026年起，该公司还开始交付SpotSprayING点喷机，该机使用与行内中耕机相同的算法来区分植物和杂草。点喷机提供5种不同的工作宽度，从2.75米到12米不等，起价7.5万欧元。凭借12米的工作宽度，该制造商为悬挂式三点悬挂点喷机树立了新的标准。在独立配置中，点喷机和药箱组合成一个单元，位于拖拉机后方。在分体配置中，标准的400升药箱移至前方。

Farm-ING LaserING激光除草机的工作宽度为2米或3米，预计将于今年上市。

**激光除草机今年即将推出**

激光除草目前是全球农民、种植者和承包商极为关注的热门话题，Farm-ING也加入了提供激光除草解决方案的公司行列。首台悬挂式激光除草机原型已在2025年德国汉诺威Agritechnica贸易展上展出。Farm-ING LaserING激光除草机的工作宽度为2米或3米，预计将于2026年上市，起价30万欧元。
author: René Koerhuis
contentHtml: Austrian smart farming equipment specialist Farm-ING has added 2 additional smart weeder options to its line-up. Farmers and contractors can now also spot-spray and laser-weed with Farm-ING.
